description: Emmett Hollyer, General Manager of Solana Mobile, discusses the launch of the Seeker phone, emphasizing the need for a mobile solution in the crypto space. He highlights the success of the Saga phone and the overwhelming community support for Chapter 2, which has already seen over 140,000 units pre-sold and $150 million in pre-orders.
topic_summary: Emmett Hollyer presents the Seeker phone as the next step for Solana Mobile, showcasing its potential to enhance the mobile crypto experience and discussing the success of previous models like Saga. He emphasizes community support and the importance of accessibility in crypto technology [t=250.80].
